nasb.text: Then David built an altar to the Lord there and offered burnt offerings and peace offerings. And he called to the Lord and He answered him with fire from heaven on the altar of burnt offering.

esv.text: And David built there an altar to the Lord and presented burnt offerings and peace offerings and called on the Lord, and the Lord  answered him with fire from heaven upon the altar of burnt offering.

cnv.text: 大衛在那裡為耶和華築了一座祭壇，獻上燔祭和平安祭；他呼求耶和華，耶和華就應允他，從天上降火在燔祭壇上。

ccb.text: 大卫在那里为耶和华建了一座坛，献上燔祭和平安祭，并求告耶和华。耶和华垂听了他的祷告，从天上降火在祭坛上，
